data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan Uncertain About Future Role
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan has expressed uncertainty about his future role following the end of his current interim term this weekend. According to Odaily, Milan stated that he will continue in his current position until a successor is confirmed. Whether he will attend the Federal Reserve meeting in March depends on the Senate's timeline for confirming Walsh's nomination. If the confirmation process takes more than six weeks, Milan will participate in the meeting.

data.title: U.S. Senate Approves Funding Bill to Prevent Government Shutdown
data.description: The U.S. Senate has passed a spending bill to fund most federal government departments, moving it to the House of Representatives for consideration. According to PANews, the funding for several federal departments was set to run out on January 30. Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer's spokesperson announced on January 29 that an agreement had been reached between Senate Democrats and Republicans to prevent a partial government shutdown. The agreement includes advancing the government funding bill to provide resources for most departments for the remainder of the fiscal year, while granting a two-week temporary funding extension for the Department of Homeland Security. This extension aims to allow further negotiations on limiting the department's immigration enforcement actions.

data.title: Quantum Computing and Cryptographic Security: A Reality Check
data.description: Crypto KOL Eli5defi on X highlights the growing concern over quantum computing's potential impact on cryptographic security. Recent headlines have sparked fears that quantum computers could soon break current cryptographic systems. However, experts suggest that while quantum computing is advancing, it is not yet at a stage where it poses an immediate threat to cryptographic security. The discussion emphasizes the need for ongoing research and development in quantum-resistant cryptographic methods to ensure future security. Eli5defi underscores the importance of staying informed about technological advancements and their implications for the crypto industry.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman to Continue Until Successor Confirmed
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman announced that her current term concludes this weekend, but she will remain in her position until a successor is confirmed. According to NS3.AI, Bowman expressed uncertainty regarding her future plans following the end of her term. Her participation in the Federal Reserve's March meeting is contingent on the Senate's timeline for confirming nominee Waller. If the confirmation process extends beyond six weeks, Bowman will attend the meeting.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan may attend the March meeting.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that his next move after his current interim governorship (which ends this weekend) is unclear. However, he said, "One thing is certain: I will remain in my current position until my successor is confirmed." Milan indicated that his attendance at the March Fed meeting depends on the Senate confirmation timeline for Warsh's nomination. If the confirmation process takes more than six weeks, he will attend. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale spent $8.02 million to buy 1,585 XAUT tokens within 24 hours, bringing its total holdings to $13 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 24 hours, a whale (0xfe1...b9f) spent $8.02 million to buy 1,585 XAUT tokens. This whale currently holds a total of 2,563.77 XAUT tokens, with a total purchase cost of $13 million and an average purchase price of $5,069.

data.title: Epstein's Skepticism on Bitcoin's Long-Term Value Revealed in Emails
data.description: Jeffrey Epstein reportedly expressed skepticism about Bitcoin's worth in 2017, as revealed in recently released emails. According to NS3.AI, Epstein had been aware of Bitcoin since 2011 and invested in the cryptocurrency and related startups. His focus was primarily on profit rather than the philosophical aspects of Bitcoin. Epstein frequently traded Bitcoin instead of holding it for the long term, doubting its potential as a mainstream asset.

data.title: Potential SpaceX and Tesla Merger Could Form Major Bitcoin Reserve
data.description: Discussions are underway regarding a potential merger between SpaceX and Tesla, which could consolidate their corporate bitcoin holdings to nearly 20,000 BTC. According to NS3.AI, this merger would result in one of the largest single corporate bitcoin reserves. The development underscores a growing trend of institutional interest and allocation of bitcoin by major corporations.

data.title: Why Bitcoin’s Drop Doesn’t Look Like a Cycle Top
data.description:
Bitcoin is transitioning into a cooldown phase rather than a full-cycle breakdown, according to multiple on-chain cycle indicators. While price has pulled back meaningfully from recent highs, the structure shown across cycle oscillators suggests the market is releasing excess leverage and volatility instead of entering a deep capitulation regime.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/why-bitcoins-drop-doesnt-look-like-a-cycle-top/

data.title: A Reddit-like social network for AI agents is getting weird, and memecoin traders are cashing in
data.description:
A social network reminiscent of Reddit, specifically designed for artificial intelligence agents, is becoming increasingly bizarre as its users engage in unexpected interactions and behaviors. In this unconventional online space, traders of memecoins are seizing the opportunity to capitalize on the peculiar trends and developments that arise from the unique dynamics of AI discussions, leading to a lucrative environment for those looking to profit from the rapidly evolving landscape of digital currencies.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/news-analysis/2026/01/30/a-reddit-like-social-network-for-ai-agents-is-getting-weird-and-memecoin-traders-are-cashing-in
